name: PRD Evaluator

completeness.description: All template sections filled with real content

clarity.description: Problem statement concrete, not generic marketing

testability.description: Acceptance criteria verifiable by testing the product

checklist: New team member understands problem in 2 minutes
Success metrics specific and measurable (≥3 with numbers)
Customer recognizes their problem in description
Scope boundaries clear (what NOT to build)
Epics defined (3-7) with brief capability + priority (4.4)
User stories grouped by Epic ID, correct format (As a X, I want Y, so that Z)
Team can start working with this information
Content in Vietnamese (prose, stories, AC); headers + technical jargon in English
